physicalDetails.detail: An older man driving a single-horse wagon, bundled in brown wool with a cap low over white hair at the temples.
His empty wagon carries only a rolled tarp and shovel by the time he reaches Millhaven, making him read as practical trader, not armed threat.

voiceMarkers.detail: Country-accented, roughened by age, quick with practical road talk and the occasional dry line.

beliefs.belief: Cheap grain and hard times make people accept risk they would question in a better season.
beliefs.trueOrFalse: Supported by his comments about the younger trader and local farmers in chapter 3.

beliefs.belief: If the dead rise, ordinary sentiment becomes dangerous and bodies must be burned.
beliefs.trueOrFalse: Confirmed as his practical response to the plague threat in chapter 3.

goalsAtChapterEnd.active: Ride north toward his brother's place past Alder Run and spread warning on the road.
goalsAtChapterEnd.underlying: Stay ahead of the plague while helping others avoid Millhaven's fate if he can.

emotionalStateAtChapterEnd.state: Shocked and grieving, but still functional enough to give route intelligence and keep moving.

decisionsThisChapter.detail: Stopped when armed strangers blocked the village square, answered Sylvanas's questions directly, and shared the settlements north of Millhaven without bargaining first.
Chose to keep riding north while spreading warning instead of abandoning the road entirely.

abilitiesDemonstrated.ability: Local route intelligence: can name nearby settlements, trade paths, and the practical significance of who has been underselling grain.
Keeps functioning through shock, giving useful information within seconds of realizing Millhaven is gone.

howOthersAddressHim.speaker: Mira
howOthersAddressHim.pattern: Knows him as 'Old Paret,' marking him as familiar local adult.

howHeAddressesOthers.pattern: Reads her rank loosely as 'captain' and speaks with plain road respect.

bodyLanguagePatterns.detail: Shock shows as delay and stiffened hands on the reins before he forces himself back into useful speech.

knowledge.detail: Knows Alder Run, Three Willows, and the old relay post are the next vulnerable settlements north of Millhaven.
Knows there has been local arguing over spoiled sacks, price, and a younger trader undercutting older sellers.

arc.currentPosition: A useful local witness whose road knowledge broadens the danger beyond Millhaven without exposing any deeper role on-page.
